languages.text: {n}Инквизитор достает свиток, стянутый лентой. Печать темного воска легко поддается, и Диодас разворачивает пергамент. Строка за строкой он зачитывает приговор — размеренно, без гнева и торжества. Перечисляет имена, титулы, свидетельства, строки древних постановлений. Пока не доходит до заключения:{/n} "…да будет предан огню сей нечестивый еретик, склонившийся перед ксеносской мерзостью. Приговор непреложен. Печать поставлена. Во славу Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: {n}Инквизитор достает свиток, стянутый лентой. Печать темного воска легко поддается, и Диодас разворачивает пергамент. Строка за строкой он зачитывает приговор — размеренно, без гнева и торжества. Перечисляет имена, титулы, свидетельства, строки древних постановлений. Пока не доходит до заключения:{/n} "…да будет предан огню сей нечестивый еретик, склонившийся перед ксеносской мерзостью. Приговор непреложен. Печать поставлена. Во славу Бога-Императора".

languages.text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. Until he arrives at the final lines:{/n} "...let this impious heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: {n}审判官取出一卷用缎带封缄的卷轴。深色的蜡封轻易脱落，阿夫·伊拉蒙展开卷轴。他逐行宣读判决，语气平稳，既不愤怒，也不得意。他念出姓名、头衔与证词，援引古老的谕令。直到最后几行：{/n}“……将此不敬异端，曾跪拜于异形亵渎之物者，投入烈火。此判决具有约束效力。封印已立。愿荣耀归于神皇。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. Until he arrives at the final lines:{/n} "...let this impious heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: {n}审判官取出一卷用缎带封缄的卷轴。深色的蜡封轻易脱落，阿夫·伊拉蒙展开卷轴。他逐行宣读判决，语气平稳，既不愤怒，也不得意。他念出姓名、头衔与证词，援引古老的谕令。直到最后几行：{/n}“……将此不敬异端，曾跪拜于异形亵渎之物者，投入烈火。此判决具有约束效力。封印已立。愿荣耀归于神皇。”

languages.text: {n}L'inquisiteur sort un rouleau de parchemin lié par un ruban. Le sceau de cire noire cède facilement, et af Irramon le déroule. Ligne après ligne, il prononce la sentence, d'un ton assuré, mais dénué de colère ou de jubilation. Il égrène la litanie des noms, titres et témoignages, entrecoupée de citations extraites d'anciens décrets, jusqu'à ce qu'il arrive enfin aux dernières lignes :{/n} « ... que cet hérétique impie qui a osé se prosterner devant l'abomination xénos soit livré aux flammes. Le verdict est sans appel et son sort scellé comme ce parchemin. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. Until he arrives at the final lines:{/n} "...let this impious heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

Ligne après ligne, il prononce la sentence, d'un ton assuré, mais dénué de colère ou de jubilation. Il égrène la litanie des noms, titres et témoignages, entrecoupée de citations extraites d'anciens décrets, jusqu'à ce qu'il arrive enfin aux dernières lignes :{/n} « ... que cet hérétique impie qui a osé se prosterner devant l'abomination xénos soit livré aux flammes. Le verdict est sans appel et son sort scellé comme ce parchemin. Pour la gloire de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: {n}Engizisyoncu, kurdeleye bağlı bir parşömen çıkarıyor. Koyu mum mühür kolayca açılıyor ve af İrramon, parşömeni aralıyor. Öfke ya da zafer edasından yoksun, istikrarlı bir şekilde satır satır okuyor. İsimleri, ünvanları ve ifadeleri listeliyor ve kadim kararnamelerden alıntılar yapıyor. Nihayet son satıra geliyor.{/n} "Zeno iğrençliğinin önünde eğilen bu dinsiz kâfir, alevlere teslim edilsin. Ceza bağlayıcıdır. Mühür vurulmuştur. Tanrı İmparator'un şanına zeval gelmesin."
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: {n}El Inquisidor saca un pergamino cerrado con un lazo. El sello de cera oscura se abre con facilidad y af Irramon lo desenrolla. Línea a línea, lee la sentencia con constancia, sin ira ni triunfo en la voz. Lista nombres, títulos y testimonios y cita decretos ancestrales. Por fin, llega a las últimas frases:{/n} «... Que este impío hereje, que se ha arrodillado frente a la abominación xenos, se purifique entre las llamas. La sentencia es vinculante. El sello está marcado. Por la gloria del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. Until he arrives at the final lines:{/n} "...let this impious heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: {n}Der Inquisitor zieht eine mit einem Band verschnürte Rolle hervor. Af Irramon erbricht das dunkle Wachssiegel und entrollt das Pergament. Zeile für Zeile liest er das Urteil vor ... langsam, ohne Zorn oder Triumph. Er nennt Namen, Titel und Zeugen und zitiert alte Dekrete. Schließlich gelangt er zu den letzten Zeilen:{/n} "... soll dieser gottlose Ketzer, der sich der Xenox-Abscheulichkeit beugte, den Flammen übergeben werden. Das Urteil ist bindend und besiegelt. Für den Ruhm des Gottimperators."
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. languages.text: {n}インクィジターはリボンで結ばれた巻物を引き出す。暗く光るワックスの印章は容易に剥がれ、イラモンは羊皮紙を展開する。一行ずつ、彼は宣告を読み上げる。怒りも勝利も感じさせない、穏やかな声で。名前、称号、証言、そして古の法令を列挙する。そして、最後の行に達する。{/n}「...この神に背く異端者、異星の神に跪いた者、炎に焼かれよ。この宣告は絶対。印章は押された。神皇帝の栄光のために。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Inquisitor draws out a scroll bound with ribbon. The dark wax seal yields easily, and af Irramon unrolls the parchment. Line by line, he reads out the sentence — steadily, with neither wrath nor triumph. He lists names, titles, and testimonies, and cites ancient decrees. Until he arrives at the final lines:{/n} "...let this impious heretic, who bowed down before the xenos abomination, be consigned to the flames. The sentence is binding. The seal is set. For the glory of the God-Emperor."
